name: Missed some work after chem exposure but no doctor note—claim denied?
description: Get doctor note now; payroll proves lost time.

mainEntity.name: Missed some work after chem exposure but no doctor note—claim denied?

acceptedAnswer.text: Get doctor note now; payroll proves lost time.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Not automatically; explain circumstances but get retroactive medical proof ASAP.** Utah requires substantiation but accepts later evidence.[6] Key factors: payroll records show absence, symptoms consistent with exposure. Visit doctor now for nexus; appeal if denied. Lawyers salvage these with expert affidavits.
